label: Peroneal tendinitis without rupture or infection red flags
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated peroneal tendinitis.
No tendon rupture, fracture/dislocation concern, neurovascular compromise, infection, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Tendon rupture, fracture/dislocation concern, severe pain, neurovascular compromise, infection concern, inability to use the limb, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, sports medicine, orthopedics, urgent care, or the ED if symptoms are not improving or your clinician told you to recheck.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports tendinitis framing, activity modification, symptom care, and warning signs. Autonomous expansion approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed peroneal tendinitis without rupture, fracture/dislocation concern, neurovascular compromise, infection, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports tendinitis framing, activity modification, symptom care, and warning signs. Autonomous expansion approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed peroneal tendinitis without rupture, fracture/dislocation concern, neurovascular compromise, infection, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated peroneal tendinitis
no tendon rupture, fracture/dislocation concern, neurovascular compromise, infection, or specialist-directed plan documented
